mechanism: Mark-to-model NAVs with autocorrelation 0.5-0.7 delay measured correlation increase by 12-18 months after economic correlation shifts. This creates false impression of normal regime persisting when crisis regime may have already begun at the fundamental level.
regime_dependence: Effect scales with private credit market size ($1.7-1.8T). More significant than in prior cycles when private credit was <$200B. Direction of bias is consistently toward false optimism.
